testcase.name: Upload Dropdown — Each Modal Opens Correctly › "Audio & video files" opens upload modal with drag-drop zone
Upload Dropdown — Each Modal Opens Correctly › "Instant speech" opens the instant speech setup modal
Upload Dropdown — Each Modal Opens Correctly › "Transcribe from link" opens the link modal
Upload Dropdown — Each Modal Opens Correctly › "Record meeting" opens the meeting bot modal
Upload Dropdown — Each Modal Opens Correctly › no console errors when opening all 4 modals sequentially
Upload Dropdown — My Records Page › 1: Upload button is visible in the page header
Upload Dropdown — My Records Page › 2: Clicking Upload opens dropdown with 4 items
Upload Dropdown — My Records Page › 3: "Audio & video files" item opens the upload modal
Upload Dropdown — My Records Page › 4: Upload modal can be closed with the X button
Upload Dropdown — My Records Page › 5: Dropdown closes when Escape is pressed (no modal opens)
testcase.system-out: [screenshot] C:\Users\kutsk\transcribe2text\e2e-tests\screenshots\upload-dropdown\05-dropdown-closed-escape.png Dropdown closed with Escape; no modal opened

testcase.name: Upload Dropdown — My Records Page › 6: Instant speech, Transcribe from link, and Record meeting items open without crash
testcase.system-out: [screenshot] C:\Users\kutsk\transcribe2text\e2e-tests\screenshots\upload-dropdown\06a-instant-speech-modal.png [screenshot] C:\Users\kutsk\transcribe2text\e2e-tests\screenshots\upload-dropdown\06b-transcribe-from-link-modal.png [screenshot] C:\Users\kutsk\transcribe2text\e2e-tests\screenshots\upload-dropdown\06c-record-meeting-modal.png All 3 other dropdown items opened without error

testcase.name: Upload Dropdown — My Records Page › 7: Upload > Audio & video files inside a folder pre-selects that folder in the modal
testcase.system-out: Opening folder: "Sprint Planning" [screenshot] C:\Users\kutsk\transcribe2text\e2e-tests\screenshots\upload-dropdown\07a-inside-folder.png [screenshot] C:\Users\kutsk\transcribe2text\e2e-tests\screenshots\upload-dropdown\07b-upload-dropdown-inside-folder.png [screenshot] C:\Users\kutsk\transcribe2text\e2e-tests\screenshots\upload-dropdown\07c-upload-modal-inside-folder.png Upload modal opened with folder "Sprint Planning" pre-selected [screenshot] C:\Users\kutsk\transcribe2text\e2e-tests\screenshots\upload-dropdown\07d-upload-modal-closed.png
